issues.sample: My vehicle is receiving a notice "Steer Assist is Reduced Drive with Care".  Per discussion with the dealership this is a result of a thermostat issue causing an issue with the grease temperature in the steering.  Based on a bulletin to the dealerships from 2017 this is a known i

AS I WAS DRIVING I SMELLED A BURNING SMELL. A FEW SECONDS LATER SAW A FIRE/SMOKE COMING FROM THE FRONT RIGHT SIDE OF MY CAR. I PULLED OVER AND TOOK A LOOK. CONFIRMED MY CAR WAS ON FIRE. I CALLED 911 WHO CONNECTED ME TO THE FIRE DEPARTMENT. I THEN RAN TO THE GAS STATION AND GOT A

" TAKATA RECALL " WHEN DRIFTING FORWARD LIGHTING TOUCHING BRAKES THEY MAKE A LOUD SQUEAKING SOUND.  WHEN CAR IS IN REVERSE LIGHTING TOUCHING THE BRAKES THEY MAKE A LOUD SQUEAKING SOUND. VERY EMBARRASSING!!! NEVER PURCHASED A CAR WITH BRAKE ISSUES LIKE THIS AND BEING TOLD THIS JUS

MY VEHICLE WAS STRUCK AT APPROX 35 MPH ON THE DRIVER'S SIDE. THE STRIKING VEHICLE DID NOT APPLY THE BRAKES SO THE FULL FORCE OF THE VEHICLE HIT. THE SIDE AIRBAGS DID NOT DEPLOY, LEAVING ME WITH A CONCUSSION AS MY HEAD STRUCK THE DRIVER'S DOOR WINDOW.  THE VEHICLE WAS IN MOTION MA

Service stability track light came on. Brought to Mechanic hooked up to computer. No code shown. Mechanic says car is fine. Keep it off for 15 minutes and the computer will reset. Driving on the highway Emergency brake came on by itself and stopped the vehicle all caution lights

narrative.headline: What 2019 Cadillac Xt5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 32 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (25% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
